皇太极驾崩，风暴一触即发。历史上的多尔衮妥协退让，最终成为"皇父摄政王"，39岁病逝，死后被掘墓鞭尸。
这一次，他带着400年后的记忆和一个系统归来。
他要用"战争债券"和"帝国国防军"，以降维打击之势横扫李自成、阻击日本、驱逐荷兰。
他要让这片土地不再沉沦，让这个民族不再屈辱。
有些历史遗憾，这一次他亲手改写。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oaa46c75726c2e443e4147b6b5a80805f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"一整个秋天","author_id":"","book_id":"7605191348706102297","book_name":"大清日不落：从全球分封开始","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1739人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":503,"name":"清朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=503&name=清朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":502,"name":"宫廷侯爵","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=502&name=宫廷侯爵&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7605191556542235160","read_count":"1739","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"307047"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"102","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,清朝,宫廷侯爵,系统,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oaa46c75726c2e443e4147b6b5a80805f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779253368&x-signature=CJtHxHxqP1IVpFmOofIvhHEKpv4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3104609304315645","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"53"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321130248D9140B45EA4D3617BD51"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读50分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"for
